description: 一战前欧洲(1913), 1913Q1 to 1925Q2, 19 countries, 50 rounds. Each round=3 months. Following is issue-specific leadership preference (NOT alliance).
following_definition: 追随!=同盟: 追随是对某国在特定议题上的领导偏好, 不等同于战略同盟关系。盟友可能在经济议题上追随敌对阵营的领导者, 这是正常的外交现象。每轮的追随基于该轮最突出议题上的政策协调对象。

key_issue_specific_cases.France(4): Ally=Russia(2), follows UK(3) on naval/colonial issues. July Crisis(R7) temporarily follows Russia on security.
key_issue_specific_cases.Italy(6): Triple Alliance member with Germany(1), follows UK(3) on colonial/naval issues - classic issue-based defection.
key_issue_specific_cases.Netherlands(13): Economic ties to Germany(1), follows UK(3) on sea power/trade issues.
key_issue_specific_cases.Switzerland(17): German-speaking economic ties to Germany(1), follows UK(3) on security balance issues.

1.dominant_issue: London Conference - Balkan territorial settlement, UK leads diplomacy

2.dominant_issue: Second Balkan War - Bulgaria vs Serbia/Greece, Russia backs Slavic alliance

3.dominant_issue: Treaty of Bucharest - Balkan territorial resettlement, A-H vs Russia for influence

4.dominant_issue: Liman von Sanders crisis - German military mission to Ottoman, Russia-Germany tension

5.dominant_issue: Anglo-German naval race peaks - UK dominates maritime order, Germany accelerates shipbuilding

6.dominant_issue: Colonial competition & alliance consolidation - Franco-Russian alliance strengthens

7.dominant_issue: July Crisis - diplomatic crisis management, states choose between war and peace

8.dominant_issue: WWI outbreak - mobilization and initial battles, alliance camps coordinate militarily

9.dominant_issue: Ottoman enters war & Gallipoli - Entente vs Central Powers camps solidify

10.dominant_issue: Italy joins Entente (Treaty of London) - Italy now follows UK on war strategy

11.dominant_issue: Eastern Front crisis - Russian Great Retreat, Serbia overrun

12.dominant_issue: Serbia falls - Bulgaria joins Central Powers, Entente lands at Salonika

13.dominant_issue: Battle of Verdun begins - Western Front war of attrition

14.dominant_issue: Battle of Jutland & Portugal enters war - UK maintains naval supremacy

15.dominant_issue: Somme & Brusilov Offensive - simultaneous major offensives, Romania joins Entente

16.dominant_issue: Romania defeated & Franz Joseph dies - war fatigue emerges

17.dominant_issue: Russian Revolution (Feb) & US enters war - international landscape transforms

18.dominant_issue: French army mutinies & Greece joins Entente - Entente internal coordination strengthens

19.dominant_issue: Russian October Revolution & Caporetto - Eastern Front collapses, Italy needs UK/France support

20.dominant_issue: Passchendaele & Cambrai - new technology warfare (tanks, aircraft)

21.dominant_issue: Brest-Litovsk Treaty & German Spring Offensive preparations - Russia exits, Germany masses west

22.dominant_issue: German Spring Offensive & Allied unified command (Foch) - A-H/Ottoman/Bulgaria wavering

23.dominant_issue: Hundred Days Offensive & Central Powers collapse - Bulgaria & Ottoman surrender

24.dominant_issue: Armistice - WWI ends, empires dissolve, UK dominates postwar order

25.dominant_issue: Paris Peace Conference opens - UK dominates postwar settlement, Wilson's Fourteen Points

26.dominant_issue: Treaty of Versailles signed - Germany accepts war guilt and reparations

27.dominant_issue: Treaty of Saint-Germain - Austria-Hungary formally dissolved, Central Europe redrawn

28.dominant_issue: Treaty of Neuilly & Greco-Turkish War begins - Bulgaria loses territory

29.dominant_issue: League of Nations founded - UK leads collective security mechanism

30.dominant_issue: Treaty of Trianon & Little Entente - Central European order established, France leads Little Entente

31.dominant_issue: Polish-Soviet War - Red Army threatens Central Europe, West aids Poland

32.dominant_issue: Greco-Turkish War intensifies & Treaty of Sevres - Ottoman Empire partitioned

33.dominant_issue: Reparations negotiations - London conference sets German reparations total, France demands harsh terms

34.dominant_issue: Anglo-Soviet Trade Agreement - UK leads economic engagement with Soviet Russia

35.dominant_issue: Washington Naval Conference preparations & Austrian economic dependence on Germany

36.dominant_issue: Washington Naval Treaty - naval disarmament (5-power treaty)

37.dominant_issue: Genoa Conference - European economic reconstruction, Soviet Russia invited

38.dominant_issue: Treaty of Rapallo - Germany-Soviet secret cooperation, Germany breaks Versailles isolation

39.dominant_issue: Chanak Crisis & Mussolini's March on Rome - UK faces Turkey alone, Italian fascist regime

40.dominant_issue: Mussolini in power & Lausanne Conference - Italy turns to independent fascist foreign policy

41.dominant_issue: Ruhr Crisis - France occupies Ruhr unilaterally, UK opposes French hardline policy

42.dominant_issue: German hyperinflation - economic crisis threatens European stability

43.dominant_issue: Corfu Incident - Italy bombards Greece, League of Nations crisis

44.dominant_issue: Stresemann & Dawes Plan - German economic stabilization, international coordination

45.dominant_issue: Dawes Plan adopted - German reparations restructured, UK/US lead reconstruction

46.dominant_issue: Geneva Protocol - collective security mechanism strengthened

47.dominant_issue: London Conference - final reparations settlement, French evacuate Ruhr

48.dominant_issue: Locarno preparations - Franco-German rapprochement, UK guarantees Western borders

49.dominant_issue: Locarno negotiations - Germany accepts Western borders, European reconciliation

50.dominant_issue: Locarno Treaties signed - European collective security system established
